title: Microbiology -- The 50 Most-Frequently Cited Articles in Microbiology
bodyHtml:
HOME HELP FEEDBACK SUBSCRIPTIONS ARCHIVE SEARCH

The 50 Most-Frequently Cited Articles
in Microbiology as of August 1, 2009 -- updated monthly

Most-cited rankings are recalculated at the beginning of the month.
Rankings are based on citations to articles on this journal site from articles in .

1.  Valerie Vagner, Etienne Dervyn, S. Dusko Ehrlich

Microbiology Nov 01, 1998; 144: 3097-3104.
(In "GENOMICS")   [Abstract]     [PDF]
